raw_consumer_statement: I am filing a formal complaint against Citibank for a severe violation of the Fair Credit Billing Act ( FCBA ) regarding a closed billing dispute for " Services Not Received '' ( Reference # XXXX. I placed an online order with XXXX for XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX flowers and chocolates totaling {$120.00}. The merchant committed gross partial-fulfillment fraud : they failed to deliver the chocolates entirely, and misdelivered the flowers a day late to a completely unrelated XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX XXXX  away from my mother 's home ( where nuns had to physically bring them to her ) .When I disputed the charge, Citibank closed the XXXX in the merchant 's favor. Citibank 's investigation was a total failure of the " reasonable investigation '' required by federal law. The merchant provided a generic, non-itemized invoice that only listed " Items : {$99.00}, XXXX {$27.00} XXXX. {$120.00}. The merchant intentionally used this vague, lump-sum invoice to conceal the fact that they never fulfilled the chocolate portion of the order. I called Citibank today to appeal, and the representative forced me into circles, refusing to reopen the case unless I provided an itemized receipt. I explained to the representative that the lack of an itemized receipt IS part of the merchant 's fraudthey do not provide itemized breakdowns via email, and their website portal is intentionally broken and loops when an old order number is entered. Furthermore, the merchant 's phone system is a rigged loop designed to block consumers from reaching support.Citibank is actively violating the FCBA by placing the burden of proof on me to provide documents that the merchant intentionally withholding. Citibank blindly accepted a completely unverified, non-itemized receipt as proof of full delivery, completely ignoring my explicit dispute regarding the missing merchandise. Citibank is rewarding a fraudulent merchant and forcing me to pay for stolen goods.I demand that Citibank 's Executive Compliance Team review this case, legally demand the internal warehouse packing manifest from XXXX, or issue a full credit to my account immediately.
